final:
// // This module performs a bitwise AND operation on two 8-bit inputs, A and B, when an enable signal is asserted. If the enable signal is low, the output will be set to zero.
module top_module(
    input [7:0] A,
    input [7:0] B,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] result
);always @ (A, B, enable) begin
        if (enable) begin
            result = A ^ B;
        end
        else begin
            result = 8'b0;
        end
    end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module performs a bitwise AND operation on two 8-bit inputs, A and B, when an enable signal is asserted. If the enable signal is low, the output will be set to zero.
